'''yangolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaidy|zaidy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaidy|zaidy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yangolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yængeleth|yængeleth]] || [[word:yængelej|yængelej]] || [[word:yængelesh|yængelesh]] || [[word:yængele|yængele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangongoloth|yangongoloth]] || [[word:yangongoloj|yangongoloj]] || [[word:yangongolosh|yangongolosh]] || [[word:yangongolo|yangongolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangoloth|yangoloth]] || [[word:yangoloj|yangoloj]] || [[word:yangolosh|yangolosh]] || [[word:yangolo|yangolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangofloth|yangofloth]] || [[word:yangofloj|yangofloj]] || [[word:yangoflosh|yangoflosh]] || [[word:yangoflof|yangoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yangolotho|yangolotho]] || [[word:yangolojo|yangolojo]] || [[word:yangolosho|yangolosho]] || [[word:yangoloko|yangoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yangoloth|yangoloth]] || [[word:yangoloj|yangoloj]] || [[word:yangolosh|yangolosh]] || [[word:yangolo|yangolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yangolothol|yangolothol]] || [[word:yangolojol|yangolojol]] || [[word:yangoloshol|yangoloshol]] || [[word:yangolokol|yangolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yangolothotho|yangolothotho]] || [[word:yangolojojo|yangolojojo]] || [[word:yangoloshosho|yangoloshosho]] || [[word:yangoloko|yangoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yangolothon|yangolothon]] || [[word:yangolojon|yangolojon]] || [[word:yangoloshon|yangoloshon]] || [[word:yangolokon|yangolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yangolothoro|yangolothoro]] || [[word:yangolojoro|yangolojoro]] || [[word:yangoloshoro|yangoloshoro]] || [[word:yangolokoro|yangolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
